MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter:

Greg Groeneveld, Esq. for and with plaintiff Aaron Ng, was placed under oath and direct examined.

Default has been entered against the Defendant Bill Chan.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,644.00
Attorney's Fees - $12,329.75
General Damages - $42,026.25
Total judgment in the amount of $85,000.00
Counsel to prepare Judgment and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.

3:30 p.m.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
